message:
ci(release): bump softprops/action-gh-release to v3

v3.0.0 moves the action runtime from Node 20 to Node 24. ubuntu-latest
(ubuntu-24.04) supports the Node 24 Actions runtime natively, so the
release workflow can adopt v3 without further changes.

Implemented independently of dependabot PR #3 per project no-PR policy.

files.patch:
@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@ jobs:
           sha256sum *.tar.gz > SHA256SUMS.txt
 
       - name: Create GitHub release
-        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v3
         with:
           files: |
             dist/*.tar.gz
